items.claim: Cody Darden performs well at the start of his fights but fades as they progress.
items.quote: He seems like he has so much promise at the start of his fights and then just goes goes badly.

items.claim: Costa is a more skilled fighter than Cody Darden in all areas.
items.quote: I think he's better than Cody everywhere.

items.claim: Short-notice fighters are statistically at a disadvantage regarding betting odds.
items.quote: most of the time if they're if they're coming in a little bit later, if they're short notice, the odds are always against them.

items.claim: Zach Reese is susceptible to getting hit frequently.
items.quote: I do think that Zach Reese does get hit a lot.

items.claim: Zach Reese possesses good recovery ability despite being rocked in fights.
items.quote: He does get, you know, rocked, but he does have good recovery.

items.claim: Caesar Ameda has not been on a good run of form in his recent fights.
items.quote: I don't think he's been on a good run.

items.claim: Caesar Ameda has shown vulnerability to being dropped in previous fights.
items.quote: Caesar actually got dropped. He got dropped really bad

items.claim: Caesar Ameda demonstrated durability by going the distance against Alex Pereira in kickboxing.
items.quote: the guy fought Alex Pereira as well. All the way kickboxing. Yeah. Still went the distance, which is pretty impressive.

items.claim: Tracy Cortez is not a high-level performer inside the octagon.
items.quote: I like Tracy Cortez as a person, but I don't rate her in the octagon that much.
